headline: Soaring Mortgage Rates Hit US Homebuilders: One Building ETF Still Wins
summary: Mortgage rates hit 6.75%, hurting US homebuilders, while one construction ETF gains from booming AI and infrastructure demand.

raw.headline: Soaring Mortgage Rates Hit US Homebuilders: One Building ETF Still Wins
raw.summary: Mortgage rates hit 6.75%, hurting US homebuilders, while one construction ETF gains from booming AI and infrastructure demand.

headline: Lennar (LEN): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Shareholders of Lennar would probably like to forget the past six months even happened. The stock dropped 28.1% and now trades at $83.36. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

raw.headline: Lennar (LEN): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?

headline: Will Mortgage Rates Hit 7% As Borrowing Costs Keep Climbing?
summary: Mortgage rates hit 6.75% as Kobeissi warned inflation and Treasury yields could push rates above 7%.
